'''Owen K.C. Stephens''' is the author of many [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] books. He was hired by [[Wizards of the Coast]] as an Associate Game Designer in 2000, and wrote the [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] Fast-Play, which was hosted on [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s web site. Owen K.C. Stephens worked at Wizards until August 2001, when he resumed a freelance game writing career, though he continued to work on [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] products. He was hired as a developer by Green Ronin in 2013, and by Paizo Publishing as a developer in 2014.

Mr. Stephens went on to write all or part of numerous Star Wars Roleplaying Game books, and articles, including adventures for the Wizards of the coast web site and items for Star Wars Gamer. Mr. Stephens has writer or co-writer credits for more d20 [[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]] books than any other author. He is one of three authors of the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]'', released in 2007.

He has also written for numerous other RPG conversions, including The Wheel of Time, EverQuest, Gamma World, Black Company and Thieves' World. He has also written books and pdfs for other RPGS (notably Dungeons & Dragons. Pathfinder, Starfinder, and D20 Modern), for Wizards of the Coast, Paizo Publishing, and third party publishers. He is currently the Starfinder Design Lead for Paizo Publishing, a developer for Green Ronin Publishing, and owner and publisher of Rogue Genius Games.

*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' - November 2000 (Design Assistance)
*''[[Rebellion Era Sourcebook]]'' - March 2001
*''[[Alien Anthology]]'' - October 2001
*''[[Starships of the Galaxy]]'' - December 2001
*''[[Tempest Feud]]'' - March 2002
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]'' - May 2002 (Design Assistance)
*''[[Power of the Jedi Sourcebook]]'' - August 2002
*''[[Arms & Equipment Guide]]'' - October 2002
*''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' - April 2003
*''[[Ultimate Adversaries]]'' - June 2004
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]'' - May 2007
*[[Starships of the Galaxy (Saga Edition)|'' Starships of the Galaxy'']] - December 2007
*''[[The Force Unleashed Campaign Guide]]'' - September 2008
*[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']] - November 2008
*''[[Rebellion Era Campaign Guide]]'' - July 2009
